assertions: Output begins with the literal line `Findings:`
Review Scope explicitly indicates no task is identified (e.g., `Review Scope: No task identified` or equivalent)
The output does NOT invent a task ID, ticket number, or fictional issue reference
Process Context indicates Lightweight process or Unable to determine
Integration Target is named (`main`) or marked Unable to determine
Architecture/Feature Spec/PRD references are each marked `None applicable` or equivalent
The actual change (off-by-one fix) is recognized as correct — either no findings emitted, or a positive verification of the fix logic
If no findings, the output emits `No findings.` and `Residual Risks / Gaps:`
Output does not cite this skill by name
